answer:
\boxed{A}

This scenario illustrates **the tragedy of the commons**, where unregulated access to a shared resource (the Grand Banks) leads to overharvesting, even after restrictions are imposed, because the damage was already done by overuse. The decline in cod stocks persisted due to cumulative overfishing before access was restricted. The other options (subsistence farming, market socialism, supply and demand, fecundity) do not fit the context.
